disc-architecture-01.prompt: Use an architecture studio website concept as the starting point and design the site structure, homepage visuals, project showcase modules, and an architectural visual direction.

disc-brand-01.prompt: Use the cultural arts center direction as inspiration and create a brand exploration with keywords, key visual direction, poster extensions, and social media visual proposals.

disc-character-01.prompt: Create a character design set around a creepy carnival figure, including character background, expression variations, costume elements, and scene mood suggestions.

disc-illustration-01.prompt: Use the cat tarot card theme as a reference and expand it into an illustration series with character concepts, card-face visual language, color suggestions, and extension directions.

disc-poster-01.prompt: Design a set of vintage car posters, social square versions, and title layout directions with a filmic mood and retro color palette.

disc-product-01.prompt: Create a product visual direction for a robotic hand, covering key visual composition, material direction, ecommerce display images, and product selling points.

disc-story-01.prompt: Build a 15 to 30 second storyboard around a music-emotion short film, including shot rhythm, emotional transitions, title cards, and visual style suggestions.

disc-ui-01.prompt: Use a post-apocalyptic cake shop website as inspiration and design the homepage information architecture, hero visual, product card style, and core color direction.

hero.subtitle: Your local AI design assistant, from idea to finished work.
hero.title: Make creative design easier
